somali.ready_to_use_micro_units_3_5_days_each: Cutubyo yaryar oo diyaar u ah isticmaal (3-5 maalmood mid kasta) oo loogu talagalay mawduucyada jajabka caadiga ah. Qorshe kastaa wuxuu ku xiraa hawlaha tabbadaha Fraction Lab ee gaarka ah si aad si toos ah u muujiso ama u qoondayso.
somali.the_earliest_fraction_notation_dates_t: Qoraalka jajabka ugu horreeya wuxuu dib u tegaa Masar hore qiyaastii 1800 BCE. Masaaridu waxay isticmaaleen "jajab unug" — kaliya jajabyada tirada saraysa 1 (sida 1/2, 1/3, 1/4). Waxay jajab kasta oo kale u qoreen wadar jajab unug ah: 2/5 = 1/3 + 1/15. Qoraalka baarka casriga ah (tirada sare oo ka sarreysa tirada hoose) wuxuu ka yimid xisaabyahannada Carabta ee dhexe qiyaastii 1200 CE.
somali.where_do_the_fraction_words_come_from: Xaggee ayay erayada jajabku ka yimaadeen?
somali.numerator_comes_from_the_latin_numerar: "Numerator" wuxuu ka yimid Laatiinka "numerare" (in la tiriyo) — wuxuu tiriyaa immisa qaybood. "Denominator" wuxuu ka yimid "denominare" (in la magacaabo) — wuxuu magacaabaa cabbirka qaybaha. Wadajir: tirada hoose waxay magacawdaa nooca gooyada; tirada sare waxay tirisaa immisa gooyo oo kuwaas ah oo aad haysato.
somali.decimals_as_we_know_them_were_populari: Decimalka sida aan u naqaan waxaa caan ka dhigay Simon Stevin 1585 buuggiisa "De Thiende" (Toban). Ka hor taas, jajabyadu waxay ahaayeen kaliya habka lagu muujiyo tirooyinka aan dhammaystirneyn. Dhibicda decimal waxay noqotay mid caalami ah oo la aqbalay kaliya 1700-meeyadii.
somali.percent_comes_from_the_latin_per_centu: "Percent" wuxuu ka yimid Laatiinka "per centum" — "boqolkii." Sidaa darteed 25% macnaheedu waa 25 boqolkii, ama 25/100. Calaamadda % waxay ka soo baxday soo-gaabinta "per c." ee qoraalka ganacsi ee Talyaaniga qarnigii 15-aad.
somali.the_reciprocal_of_a_b_is_b_a_flip_it_u: Reciprocalka a/b waa b/a — rogo. Jajab kasta oo aan eber ahayn wuxuu leeyahay reciprocal. Badeecada jajabka iyo reciprocalkiisu had iyo jeer waa 1: (3/4) × (4/3) = 12/12 = 1. Tan awgeed ayaa u qaybinta jajab la mid tahay isku-dhufashada reciprocalkiisa.
somali.why_is_1_2_the_most_used_fraction: Maxay 1/2 u tahay jajabka ugu badan la isticmaalo?
somali.1_2_is_the_most_common_fraction_in_eve: 1/2 waa jajabka ugu caansan hadalka maalinlaha ah sababtoo ah wuxuu si sax ah u fadhiyaa bartamaha 0 iyo 1. Waxa kale oo uu yahay jajabka kaliya ee aan si joogto ah ku muujino erayo: "badh" halkii "mid ka sarreeya laba." Luqadaha kale waxay leeyihiin erayo gaar ah 1/3 iyo 1/4 sidoo kale (saddex meelood, rubuc).
somali.a_pizza_is_a_perfect_fraction_model_be: Pizza waa qaab jajab oo qumman sababtoo ah waa goobo (sidaa darteed dhammaan gooyooyinka waxay ka soo baxaan xarunta), gooyooyinka way fududahay in la tiriyo, qaabkuna wuxuu waafaqsan yahay qeexitaanka xisaabeed ee rasmiga ah: jajab n/d waa n qaybood oo siman oo ka mid ah wadarta d qaybood oo siman.
somali.some_numbers_like_and_2_cannot_be_writ: Tirooyin qaar, sida π iyo √2, laguma qori karo jajab laba tiro oo dhan ah. Kuwan waxaa loo yaqaan tirooyin aan macquul ahayn. Pythagoreans (qiyaastii 500 BCE) waxaa la sheegay inay dileen xisaabyahankii Hippasus markuu caddeeyay in √2 aan loo qori karin jajab.
somali.any_real_number_can_be_written_as_a_co: Tiro dhab ah kasta waxaa loo qori karaa "jajab socda" — jajab ku dhex jira sida 1 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + ...))). Tani waxay bixisaa qiyaasaha jajabka ugu fiican. π ≈ 22/7 laga bilaabo erayada kowaad ee yar; mid ka sii fiican waa 355/113.
somali.musical_pitch_ratios_are_fractions_the: Saamiyada cod-dhawaaqa muusikada waa jajabyo. Octave waa saami 2:1 (soo-noqoshadu waa laba-jibbaartaa). Shanaadka qumman waa 3:2. Saddexaadka weyn waa 5:4. Pythagoras wuxuu ogaaday in saamiyada tirada dhan ee fudud ay soo saaraan cod-dhawaaqyo isku waafaqsan.
somali.two_pizzas_can_only_be_combined_if_the: Laba pizza waa la isku dari karaa kaliya haddii loo gooyo gooyo isku cabbir ah. Tiro hoose kala duwan = gooyo cabbir kala duwan = si toos ah looma isku dari karo. Tirada hoose ee guud macnaheedu waa dhab ahaan "gooyo isku cabbir ah."
somali.a_batting_average_like_333_means_1_3_o: Celceliska garaaca sida .333 macnaheedu waa 1/3 garaacyada ayaa keena garaac. ERA-da tuuraha, boqolkiiba-saldhig, boqolkiiba-garaac — dhammaantood waa jajabyo. Baseball wuxuu ahaa isboortiga ugu horreeya ee caan ka dhigay nooca fikirka tirakoobka, laga bilaabo 1850-meeyadii.
somali.georges_cuisenaire_was_a_belgian_prima: Georges Cuisenaire wuxuu ahaa macallin dugsi hoose oo Beljam ah 1950-meeyadii kaas oo abuuray ulo midab leh oo dherer 1 ilaa 10 si uu carruurta uga caawiyo inay qabsadaan xiriirka tirooyinka oo ay ku jiraan jajabyada. "Derbiga jajabka" ee aad ku aragto fasallo badan waa faraca dhijitaalka ah ee ulahiisa jireed.
somali.the_chinese_mathematical_text_nine_cha: Qoraalka xisaabeed ee Shiinaha "Sagaal Cutub oo ku saabsan Farshaxanka Xisaabeed" (qiyaastii 100 BCE) wuxuu ku jiray xisaabinta jajabka, oo ay ku jirto nidaam lagu helo tirada hoose ee guud oo xisaab ahaan u dhigma waxa aan maanta baranno.
somali.computers_store_decimal_fractions_in_b: Kombuyuutarradu waxay kaydiyaan jajabyada decimalka binary. Decimalka 0.1 si sax ah looguma matali karo binary — wuxuu noqdaa jajab soo noqnoqda saldhig 2. Tan awgeed ayaa 0.1 + 0.2 mararka qaarkood ku siiya 0.30000000000000004 luqadaha barnaamijyada.

somali.let_your_number_be_n_the_sequence_n_1_: Ha tiradaadu ahaato n. Taxanaha: (n+1) × 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n + 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n. Qaybi 2 → n. Ka jar asalka → 0. Sug — taasi waxay siisaa 0, ma aha 1. Isku day: n → (n+1)×2 = 2n+2 → +4 = 2n+6 → −6 = 2n → ÷2 = n → −asalka = 0. "Xeeladdu" waxay ku tiirsan tahay constants qarsoon oo taxanaha ku jira.
somali.each_term_is_half_the_previous_the_tot: Eray kastaa waa badh kii hore. Wadartu waxay u dhowaataa 1 laakiin weligeed ma gaadho. Kani waa taxane geometric aan dhammaad lahayn oo leh eray kowaad 1/2 iyo saami 1/2: S = (1/2) / (1 − 1/2) = 1. Tan awgeed ayaa paradox-ka dhaqdhaqaaqa ee Zeno xisaab ahaan loo xallin karaa.
somali.even_though_each_term_is_small_the_ser: In kasta oo eray kastaa yar yahay, taxanahu wuu kala firdhaa. Si aad u gaadho 100, waxaad u baahan tahay qiyaastii 1.5 × 10^43 eray. Tan waxaa caddeeyay Nicole Oresme 1300-meeyadii isticmaalka kooxaynta: 1/3 + 1/4 > 1/4 + 1/4 = 1/2; 1/5+...+1/8 > 4 × 1/8 = 1/2; had iyo jeer waad heli kartaa 1/2 kale oo aad ku darto.
somali.check_1_4_and_1_3_4_1_1_3_1_check_2_5_: Hubi 1/4 iyo 1/3: (4)(1) − (1)(3) = 1. Hubi 2/5 iyo 1/2: (5)(1) − (2)(2) = 1. Sifadan waxay abuurtaa geedka Stern-Brocot ee dhammaan tirooyinka macquulka ah.
somali.rewrite_1_2_2_3_3_4_n_1_n_the_2_in_2_3: Dib u qor: 1/2 × 2/3 × 3/4 × ... × (n−1)/n. 2-da ku jirta 2/3 waxay tirtirtaa 2-da ku jirta tirada hoose ee 1/2. 3-da ku jirta 3/4 waxay tirtirtaa 3-da ku jirta tirada hoose ee 2/3. Wax kastaa waa la tirtiraa marka laga reebo 1/n.
